creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
makc        2009-08-23 16:07:48 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    archivers/packddir   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    archivers/packddir/files patch-upackddir.c 
  Log:
  Add new port archivers/packddir:
  
  PackdDir creates and unpacks PackdDir archives,
  which are used in Quake (I and II) and others.
  
  WWW:    http://www.nongnu.org/packddir/
  
  PR:             ports/138078
  Submitted by:   Ayumi M <ayu at commun.jp>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +31 -0     ports/archivers/packddir/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/archivers/packddir/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/archivers/packddir/files/patch-upackddir.c (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/archivers/packddir/pkg-descr (new)
